message.content:
Based on the provided screenshots, here's a detailed breakdown of the design system for recreating this fintech interface:

## 1. Color Palette
- **Background**: Very dark gray/black with subtle noise texture (#121212 or #111111)
- **Accent colors**: 
  - Purple (#8B5CF6 or similar)
  - Teal/cyan (#06B6D4 or similar)
  - Orange (#F97316 or similar)
  - Green (#10B981 or similar)
- **Text colors**:
  - Primary white (#FFFFFF or #F8F8F8)
  - Secondary gray (#9CA3AF)
  - Accent purple (#8B5CF6)
- **Card backgrounds**: Slightly lighter dark gray (#1E1E1E or #1F1F1F)

## 2. Typography
- **Font family**: Sans-serif (likely Inter, Poppins, or similar geometric sans-serif)
- **Heading**: Large, light weight (300-400), ~48-56px
- **Subheading**: Medium weight (400-500), ~20-24px
- **Body text**: Regular weight (400), ~16px
- **Button text**: Medium weight (500), ~14-16px
- **Small text**: Light weight (300-400), ~12-14px

## 3. Card Styles
- **Border radius**: 12-16px (medium rounded corners)
- **Padding**: 20-24px internal spacing
- **Background**: Semi-transparent dark gray (#1E1E1E with 80-90% opacity)
- **Borders**: None (uses background contrast for definition)
- **Shadow**: Subtle inner shadow or elevation effect

## 4. Texture & Overlay
- **Grain/noise texture**: Very subtle overlay on dark background (low opacity, ~5-10%)
- **Texture type**: Fine grain, monochromatic
- **Purpose**: Adds depth to dark background without distraction

## 5. Button & Interactive Elements
- **Primary buttons**: 
  - Purple background with white text
  - Medium border radius (8-10px)
  - Padding: 10-12px 20px
- **Secondary buttons**:
  - Transparent border with white text
  - Same border radius as primary
  - Hover: Slight background tint
- **Interactive states**: Subtle hover effects with background tint

## 6. Section Transitions
- **Smooth scrolling**: Natural page transitions
- **Fade in/out**: Subtle opacity transitions between sections
- **Card animations**: Slight elevation or scale on hover

## 7. Special Effects
- **Gradient text**: Subtle text gradients (purple to teal)
- **Glow effects**: Soft glow on accent elements
- **Chart visualizations**: Color-coded financial charts with gradient fills
- **Notification badges**: Small colored indicators

## 8. Spacing System
- **Vertical spacing**: 24px between major sections
- **Horizontal spacing**: 16-20px between elements
- **Grid system**: 12 or 24 column grid with consistent gutters
- **Card spacing**: 16-20px between cards

## Implementation Notes
- Use CSS custom properties for consistent color management
- Implement a subtle noise texture using CSS or SVG overlay
- Maintain high contrast for readability on dark background
- Use consistent border radius throughout the interface
- Ensure interactive elements have clear hover/focus states

This design system creates a professional, modern fintech interface with excellent readability and visual hierarchy on dark backgrounds.
